title: Body Recovered from Lake Wylie After Search
summary: York County officials recovered a body from Lake Wylie after a person submerged and did not resurface Monday night.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of water activities and the importance of safety measures around bodies of water.

title: Mallard Creek Appeals Disqualification at State Track Meet
summary: Mallard Creek High School appeals disqualification at NC state track meet after viral finish, hoping for co-championship.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the competitive nature of high school sports and the importance of fair play and officiating.

title: Senators Push 'GAME' Act to Curb Child-Targeted Gambling Ads
summary: Senators are pushing the 'GAME' Act to curb child-targeted gambling ads on TikTok and Instagram, with potential fines up to $100,000 per ad.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about the exposure of children to gambling and the need for stricter regulations on advertising.

title: Heat Wave Forecast with Multiple Days of 90+
summary: A heat wave is in the forecast with multiple days of 90+ temperatures possible this week.
charlotte_impact: Warns residents to take precautions against heat-related illnesses and stay hydrated during the hot weather.

title: Monroe Campaign Aims to Prevent Downtown Crash Injuries, Deaths
summary: Monroe PD launches 'Slow Monroe' to crack down on safety and prevent injuries/deaths from car accidents in downtown.
charlotte_impact: Focuses on improving pedestrian and driver safety in the downtown area through increased enforcement and awareness.

title: Suspect Charged in Homicide of 19-Year-Old in Rock Hill
summary: A suspect has been charged in the homicide of a 19-year-old in Rock Hill and was taken into custody in Clover.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a violent crime and the arrest of a suspect, highlighting the ongoing issue of violence in the community.

title: New Renderings Released for Controversial I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: New renderings released for the controversial I-77 toll lane project show elevated lanes with added pedestrian bridges and walkways.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on a major infrastructure project and its potential impact on traffic and community access.

title: New Tool Helping North Carolina Increase Flood Resiliency
summary: The NC Flood Resiliency Blueprint is being developed by the NC Department of Environmental Quality to increase flood resiliency.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the growing threat of flooding and the state's efforts to mitigate its impact on communities.

title: Safe Alliance Pushes for City Funding Cut from Budget Proposal
summary: Safe Alliance pushes for city funding cut from budget proposal; the organization received $397,000 last year but would receive nothing next year.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential funding challenges for organizations providing critical community services.

title: Firefighters Battle Fire at Lake Wylie Condominiums
summary: Firefighters battled a fire at condominiums on Lake Wylie for hours; multiple units were charred.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a significant fire incident and its impact on residents and property.

title: Man Found Guilty in 2023 Gastonia Murder
summary: Samuel Colt Usery, 32, was sentenced to life in prison without parole for killing Michael Drayton Jr.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a murder conviction and the sentencing of the perpetrator, providing closure to the case.

title: Local Coach, Teacher Dies Ahead of High School Baseball Game
summary: A local coach and teacher has died ahead of a high school baseball game. The cause of death has not yet been announced.
charlotte_impact: Reports on the sudden death of a respected community member and its impact on the school and local community.

title: Alex Murdaugh Sues Former Court Clerk Becky Hill
summary: Alex Murdaugh sues former court clerk Becky Hill, claiming she violated his constitutional rights during his trial.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on the legal proceedings surrounding a high-profile case and allegations of misconduct.

title: Man Facing Felony Charges After Deadly Shooting in Charlotte
summary: Lionel Rodrigues Smith is charged with first-degree murder in the shooting death of Odell Davis in west Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal shooting and the arrest of a suspect, highlighting the issue of gun violence in the city.

title: Woman Charged After Speeding Crash Knocks Out Morganton Power
summary: A 21-year-old faces charges after her speeding car hit a power pole, sign, and fire hydrant in Morganton, causing a power outage.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and its potential consequences for the community.
